'''Sharene''' was one of the two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]]. Sharene and [[Lodos (moon)|Lodos]], the other moon of Elrood, were named after a prominent husband and wife who were the first colonists of Elrood and were married under the twin moons. Both moons figured prominently in local culture and folklore.
